page_metadata.biotools__summary: The tool  can accept a gene list that will be used to retrieve a gene symbol and iTerm list. This list can be resubmitted to visualize the gene-iTerm pairs using Cytoscape or Concept Map.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: The tool  can accept a gene list that will be used to retrieve a gene symbol and iTerm list. This list can be resubmitted to visualize the gene-iTerm pairs using Cytoscape or Concept Map.
